title: FAOSTAT Domain
description: A FAOSTAT thematic domain representing a specific subject area of agricultural or food statistics, such as crop production, trade, land use, or food security.

Group Code.description: Code of the parent domain group

Group Name.description: Name of the parent domain group

Domain Code.description: Unique code identifying the domain, used as a path parameter in API calls

Date Update.description: Date when the domain data was last updated
